mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, code, name, description, parent_id, path, depth, status, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO organization (id, workspace_id, code, name, description, parent_id, path, depth, status, revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{workspaceId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{parentId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{path}, #{depth}, #{status, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{revision}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE organization SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision}

UPDATE organization SET path = #{newPath}, depth = #{newDepth}, parent_id = #{newParentId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision}
